category.scope_note: Electric, cordless, battery-powered, charger-supplied, and wireless-enabled hand-held or transportable power tools exported from China to Myanmar.

title.en: China-to-Myanmar Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入缅甸：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入緬甸：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Myanmar MSTRD standards practice, MIC import and investment touchpoints, MPT wireless requirements, electricity conditions, workplace noise, and substance or battery documentation gaps.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与缅甸 MSTRD 标准实践、MIC 进口和投资触点、MPT 无线要求、电力条件、工作场所噪声以及物质或电池文件差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與緬甸 MSTRD 標準實務、MIC 進口和投資觸點、MPT 無線要求、電力條件、工作場所噪聲以及物質或電池文件差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, import approval, MIC approval, MPT radio approval, MSTRD conformity decision, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Myanmar standards, customs practice, sector controls, radio rules, and local enforcement with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、进口批准、MIC 批准、MPT 无线电批准、MSTRD 符合性决定或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行缅甸标准、海关实践、行业管制、无线电规则和当地执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、進口批准、MIC 批准、MPT 無線電批准、MSTRD 符合性決定或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行緬甸標準、海關實務、行業管制、無線電規則和當地執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made power tools entering Myanmar, the practical baseline is MSTRD conformity documentation where requested, IEC 60745 or IEC 62841 based safety evidence, Myanmar 230 V 50 Hz suitability, MIC or customs readiness for import and investment channels, and MPT review for wireless-enabled models; Myanmar does not have a horizontal RoHS regime like the EU.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动工具进入缅甸的实务基线，是在被要求时准备 MSTRD 符合性文件、基于 IEC 60745 或 IEC 62841 的安全证据、缅甸 230 V 50 Hz 适配性、MIC 或海关进口及投资通道准备，以及无线型号的 MPT 审查；缅甸没有类似欧盟的横向 RoHS 制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動工具進入緬甸的實務基線，是在被要求時準備 MSTRD 符合性文件、基於 IEC 60745 或 IEC 62841 的安全證據、緬甸 230 V 50 Hz 適配性、MIC 或海關進口及投資通道準備，以及無線型號的 MPT 審查；緬甸沒有類似歐盟的橫向 RoHS 制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must keep official or regulator-facing sources, accessed date, verified flag, and last_verified metadata; human_reviewed remains false until local Myanmar regulatory review is completed.
